product_overview: Booky is a bilingual appointment-booking platform for service businesses, combining a public customer booking flow with an internal dashboard for managing appointments, clients, staff, services, and business settings. In demo mode, the app uses built-in sample data and allows users to explore the full product experience without real authentication or external integrations.
core_goals: Explore the marketing site and move into the product through login or signup
Access the dashboard to review appointments, revenue, and schedule activity
Manage services, staff, clients, and booking operations from the internal workspace
Book an appointment through the public customer-facing booking flow
Preview and configure the public booking page from the dashboard
Review business settings and integration status
Use the AI search assistant to query dashboard information

features.name: Marketing landing page
features.description: A scroll-driven bilingual landing page that introduces the product, shows pricing, demonstrates booking, and routes visitors into auth flows.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through the landing page sections -> Toggle the language between TR and EN -> Interact with the booking widget demo -> Click a pricing call to action -> See the checkout flow begin
Navigate to / -> Select the login link -> Arrive at the login screen
Navigate to / -> Select the signup link -> Arrive at the signup screen

features.name: Authentication (demo bypass)
features.description: Login and signup screens that accept demo input and send the user directly into the dashboard experience.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit the form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Continue with demo -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /signup -> Enter email and password -> Submit the form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /signup -> Continue with demo -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Toggle the language between TR and EN -> Continue with login or demo access -> See the dashboard

features.name: Dashboard (booking cockpit)
features.description: An internal booking operations hub showing appointment metrics, daily scheduling, revenue trends, and appointment management actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Review the stat tiles, schedule grid, appointment list, revenue chart, and upcoming alerts
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select an appointment in the list -> View the detail drawer with client, service, time, price, and status actions
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select an appointment in the list -> Open the detail drawer -> Change the appointment status to confirmed, canceled, or no-show -> See the updated status reflected in the UI
Navigate to /dashboard -> Use the grouped sidebar to move between workspace sections -> Open Calendar, Clients, Services, Staff, Booking, or Settings
Navigate to /dashboard -> Toggle the language between TR and EN -> Continue reviewing the workspace

features.name: Calendar
features.description: A scheduling view that shows appointments by staff member and lets users inspect appointment blocks by date.
user_flows: Navigate to /calendar -> Switch the displayed date -> Review the appointment blocks for each staff member
Navigate to /calendar -> Select an appointment block -> View the appointment details

features.name: Clients
features.description: A client directory with searchable records, contact details, and visit history.
user_flows: Navigate to /clients -> Browse or search the client list -> Open a client record -> Review contact information and visit history

features.name: Services management
features.description: A service configuration area for listing, adding, and editing service definitions such as duration, price, and color.
user_flows: Navigate to /services -> Review the current service list -> Add a new service -> Enter the service details -> Save the service -> See it appear in the list
Navigate to /services -> Review the current service list -> Select an existing service -> Update the service details -> Save the changes -> See the updated service information

features.name: Staff management
features.description: A staff administration area for viewing team members and editing their working hours.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff -> Review the staff list -> Add a staff member -> Enter the staff details and working hours -> Save the staff member -> See it appear in the list
Navigate to /staff -> Review the staff list -> Select an existing staff member -> Update the staff details or working hours -> Save the changes -> See the updated staff information

features.name: Public booking page
features.description: A customer-facing booking flow that guides visitors through selecting a service, choosing staff, picking a time, entering contact details, and confirming the appointment.
user_flows: Navigate to /book/demo -> Select a service -> Select a staff member or choose any available staff -> Pick a date -> Choose an available time slot -> Enter name and phone number -> Confirm the booking -> See the confirmation screen

features.name: Booking page preview
features.description: A dashboard tool that previews the public booking page and exposes the shareable booking link.
user_flows: Navigate to /booking -> Preview the public booking page layout and booking experience
Navigate to /booking -> Copy the public booking link

features.name: Settings & integrations
features.description: A settings area for updating business profile information and checking plan and integration status.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Review the business profile fields and integration status panels
Navigate to /settings -> Edit business profile information -> Save the changes -> See the updated profile reflected in settings
Navigate to /settings -> Review the language or plan options -> Change the displayed option -> See the settings update

features.name: AI search / assistant
features.description: An AI-powered search and chat experience inside the dashboard for querying product or appointment information.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Open the AI search box -> Type a query -> Submit the query -> See the assistant response

routes.description: Marketing landing page with scroll-driven hero, pricing, booking widget demo, TR/EN language toggle
Login screen (demo bypass — any submit or "Continue with demo" enters the dashboard)
Signup screen (demo bypass, same as login)
Post-signup onboarding flow (business info, services, staff)
Booking cockpit — stat row, day schedule (staff columns × time rows), appointments list with right detail drawer, revenue chart, upcoming/no-show panel
Services management panel (add/edit services, price, duration, color)
Staff management panel (add/edit staff, working hours)
Business settings — brand, integrations (Supabase, Stripe, Google Calendar, Twilio), plan
Public booking-page preview/editor inside the dashboard
Public customer-facing booking page (pick service → staff → date/time → contact info → confirm)

features.name: Marketing landing page
features.description: Scroll-scrubbed hero, feature sections, pricing cards, interactive booking widget demo, TR/EN toggle
user_interactions: Scroll through hero and feature sections
Toggle language between TR and EN in navbar
Interact with the embedded booking widget demo
Click pricing plan CTA buttons
Navigate to /login and /signup via navbar links

features.name: Authentication (demo bypass)
features.description: Login and signup screens; Supabase not connected so any submit or "Continue with demo" enters the dashboard
user_interactions: Fill email and password fields
Click submit button — redirected to /dashboard (demo bypass)
Click "Continue with demo" button — redirected to /dashboard
Toggle TR/EN language on the auth page

features.name: Dashboard (booking cockpit)
features.description: Stat row, day schedule grid with staff columns and colored service blocks, appointments list opening a right detail drawer, revenue area chart, upcoming/no-show panel; renders demo data from lib/demo/data.ts when no keys configured
user_interactions: View stat tiles and revenue chart
Click an appointment in the list to open the right detail drawer
Change appointment status (confirm, cancel, no-show) from the drawer
Navigate between sections via grouped sidebar (Workspace / Setup)
Toggle TR/EN language in the topbar

features.name: Calendar
features.description: Day/week schedule view of appointments per staff member
user_interactions: Switch dates
View appointment blocks colored by service
Click a block to see appointment details

features.name: Services management
features.description: List, add, and edit services (name, duration, price, color)
user_interactions: View service list
Click add-service button and fill the form
Edit an existing service

features.name: Staff management
features.description: List, add, and edit staff members and working hours
user_interactions: View staff list
Add a staff member via form
Edit staff details and working hours

features.name: Clients
features.description: Client list with visit history and contact info
user_interactions: Browse/search client list
Open a client to view details and history

features.name: Public booking page
features.description: Customer-facing booking flow — choose service, staff, date and time slot, enter contact info, confirm appointment
user_interactions: Select a service
Select a staff member (or any)
Pick a date and an available time slot
Enter name and phone
Confirm booking and see confirmation screen

features.name: Booking page preview
features.description: Dashboard panel previewing and configuring the public booking page
user_interactions: Preview the public booking page
Copy the public booking link

features.name: Settings & integrations
features.description: Business profile, brand, plan enforcement and integration status (Supabase, Stripe, Google Calendar, Twilio)
user_interactions: Edit business profile fields
View integration connection status
Change language / plan options

features.name: AI search / assistant
features.description: AI-powered search or chat in the dashboard
user_interactions: Open the AI search box
Type a query and submit

features.name: SMS reminders (backend)
features.description: Twilio-backed appointment reminder endpoints; no-op without Twilio keys
user_interactions: Trigger reminder send from appointment drawer (if wired)

features.name: Stripe checkout (backend)
features.description: Subscription checkout and webhook; disabled without Stripe keys
user_interactions: Click a pricing CTA to start checkout

known_limitations.issue: Demo mode — no Supabase/Stripe/Twilio keys in .env.local, so all data comes from lib/demo/data.ts and mutations are local state only
known_limitations.impact: Created/edited appointments, services, staff and clients are not persisted across reloads

known_limitations.issue: Auth is a demo bypass — submitting login/signup always enters the dashboard without real authentication
known_limitations.impact: No credential validation or error states to test

known_limitations.issue: Stripe checkout and SMS reminder endpoints return errors or no-ops without API keys
known_limitations.impact: Payment and reminder flows cannot complete end-to-end in demo mode

known_limitations.issue: App is bilingual (TR default) — UI strings appear in Turkish by default
known_limitations.impact: Tests must match Turkish labels or switch language to EN first
